title: News regarding the Philippines and China associated with the search term 'gma'
description: Recent reports highlight a diplomatic protest involving a video on Chinese state media, according to multiple sources.

sources.title: Video apparently depicting Filipinos as monkeys on China media draws Manila’s protest
Philippines Condemns AI Video Posted by Chinese State Media Depicting It as a Monkey
Philippines demands ‘racist’ Chinese state media video depicting Filipinos as monkeys be taken down

sections.heading: Video Content and Origin
paragraphs: A video apparently depicting Filipinos as monkeys was posted on Chinese state media, according to AP News. The New York Times reports that the video was an AI-generated video.

sections.heading: Philippines' Response
paragraphs: The Philippines has condemned the video and demanded that it be taken down, according to The Guardian. AP News notes that the video has drawn a protest from Manila.

sections.heading: Characterization of the Video
paragraphs: The video has been described as 'racist' in reports, according to The Guardian.

faq.q: What did the video depict according to sources?
faq.a: According to AP News, the video apparently depicted Filipinos as monkeys.

faq.q: How has the Philippines reacted to the video?
faq.a: The Philippines has condemned the video, demanded it be taken down, and lodged a protest, according to The Guardian and AP News.

news_coverage.title: Video apparently depicting Filipinos as monkeys on China media draws Manila’s protest
Philippines Condemns AI Video Posted by Chinese State Media Depicting It as a Monkey
Philippines demands ‘racist’ Chinese state media video depicting Filipinos as monkeys be taken down
